description: Today's Chip of the Day is Dirty Potato Sriracha Honey - a playful nod to April Fools' mirth.
Today marks National Peanut Butter and Jelly Day, and we honor this with Lily's Peanut Butter chip. A delightful blend of creamy peanut butter flavor perfectly paired for your culinary celebration.
event_name: National Peanut Butter and Jelly Day

description: Border Cafe Lime chips, today's flavorful discovery, take you on an exciting culinary journey.
Spicy Cayenne Cheese chips celebrate Senegal's independence day today. They're bold and fiery, reflecting the spirit of freedom that shines on this national celebration since 1960.
event_name: Independence Day, celebrates the independence of Senegal from France (1960).

description: Limon, today's vibrant chip of the day, invites you to savor the essence of China's Cold Food Festival. Celebrate by indulging its fresh zest, reminiscent of springtime flavors dancing on your palate.
event_name: Cold Food Festival, held on April 4 if it is a leap year (China); and its related observances:

description: Today marks Chakri Day, celebrating the founding of the Chakri dynasty. Revel in Thai heritage with Legendary Potato Sour Cream Onion, blending creamy richness and tangy onion flavors for an exquisite taste experience.
event_name: Chakri Day, commemorating the establishment of the Chakri dynasty. (Thailand)

description: On today's National Beer Day, savor the flavors of 'Potato Pimento,' where beer's rich essence meets Jamaican spice, offering a unique and bold snacking experience.
On this day, celebrating Buddha's Birthday and Japan's Flower Festival, Limon captures the essence of floral sweetness. Imagine blooming cherry blossoms preserved in every crispy bite.
event_name: Buddha's Birthday, also known as Hana Matsuri, "Flower Festival" (Japan)
